name: Integration - End-to-End Ticket Verification Success
description: Validates the complete workflow for a valid and unused ticket via the /api/assistant/verify_ticket endpoint, ensuring all components interact correctly.
input: POST to /api/assistant/verify_ticket with a valid ticket_code and event_id in JSON body.
output: JSON response indicating success, authorized: true, and a formatted success message.
success_criteria: Audit log event is recorded with action 'validation_success'
